'''kozabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:robinlike|robinlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:robinlike|robinlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kozabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozabithi|kozabithi]] || [[word:kozabiji|kozabiji]] || [[word:kozabishi|kozabishi]] || [[word:kozabiki|kozabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozabuthuthu|kozabuthuthu]] || [[word:kozabujuju|kozabujuju]] || [[word:kozabushushu|kozabushushu]] || [[word:kozabukuku|kozabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozabuthu|kozabuthu]] || [[word:kozabuju|kozabuju]] || [[word:kozabushu|kozabushu]] || [[word:kozabuku|kozabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozabufthuf|kozabufthuf]] || [[word:kozabufjuf|kozabufjuf]] || [[word:kozabufshuf|kozabufshuf]] || [[word:kozabufkuf|kozabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozabethe|kozabethe]] || [[word:kozabeje|kozabeje]] || [[word:kozabeshe|kozabeshe]] || [[word:kozabeke|kozabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozabothotho|kozabothotho]] || [[word:kozabojojo|kozabojojo]] || [[word:kozaboshosho|kozaboshosho]] || [[word:kozabokoko|kozabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozabotho|kozabotho]] || [[word:kozabojo|kozabojo]] || [[word:kozabosho|kozabosho]] || [[word:kozaboko|kozaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozabofthof|kozabofthof]] || [[word:kozabofjof|kozabofjof]] || [[word:kozabofshof|kozabofshof]] || [[word:kozabofkof|kozabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfthÃŸf|kozabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfjÃŸf|kozabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfshÃŸf|kozabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfkÃŸf|kozabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kozabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kozabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kozabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kozabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfthÃŸf|kozabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfjÃŸf|kozabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfshÃŸf|kozabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfkÃŸf|kozabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfthÃŸf|kozabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfjÃŸf|kozabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfshÃŸf|kozabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kozabÃŸfkÃŸf|kozabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozabÃḊthÃḊ|kozabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kozabÃḊjÃḊ|kozabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kozabÃḊshÃḊ|kozabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kozabÃḊkÃḊ|kozabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozabathatha|kozabathatha]] || [[word:kozabajaja|kozabajaja]] || [[word:kozabashasha|kozabashasha]] || [[word:kozabakaka|kozabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozabatha|kozabatha]] || [[word:kozabaja|kozabaja]] || [[word:kozabasha|kozabasha]] || [[word:kozabaka|kozabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozabafthaf|kozabafthaf]] || [[word:kozabafjaf|kozabafjaf]] || [[word:kozabafshaf|kozabafshaf]] || [[word:kozabafkaf|kozabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kozabasha|kozabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kozabshÃḋsha|kozabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kozabrosha|kozabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kozabmusha|kozabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kozabyasha|kozabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokozabnkshÃḋsha|gokozabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokozabnkrosha|gokozabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokozabnkmusha|gokozabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokozabnkyasha|gokozabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kozazabasha|kozazabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kozazabshÃḋsha|kozazabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kozazabrosha|kozazabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kozazabmusha|kozazabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kozazabyasha|kozazabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokozazabnkshÃḋsha|gokozazabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokozazabnkrosha|gokozazabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokozazabnkmusha|gokozazabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokozazabnkyasha|gokozazabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kezÃḊbasha|kezÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kezÃḊbshÃḋsha|kezÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kezÃḊbrosha|kezÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kezÃḊbmusha|kezÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kezÃḊbyasha|kezÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokezÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gokezÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokezÃḊbnkrosha|gokezÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokezÃḊbnkmusha|gokezÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokezÃḊbnkyasha|gokezÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kozfabasha|kozfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kozfabshÃḋsha|kozfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kozfabrosha|kozfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kozfabmusha|kozfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kozfabyasha|kozfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokozfabnkshÃḋsha|gokozfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokozfabnkrosha|gokozfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokozfabnkmusha|gokozfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokozfabnkyasha|gokozfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
